case_title: UNITED PROPERTY SERVICE vs. ORTIZ, BONNIE et al

docket_entries.description: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT ORTIZ, BONNIE PITTOCK, RICHARD HEARING SET FOR APR-11-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF APR-11-1994, OFF CALENDAR AMENDED COMPLAINT AND ANSWER FILED.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED PROPERTY SERVICE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-10-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ROB'T ORMISTON AS COUNSEL. DEFS. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 765 O'FARRELL, APT. B, S.F, CA. - DEFS. AGREE TO VACATE BY 6-1-94 - $3,048 RENT & DAMAGES OWED THRU 6-1-94 AT $24 PER DAY - PMTS. TO BE MADE AT $100 A MONTH STARTING 6-01-94 & THE 1ST OF EACH SUCCEEDING MONTH (NO PMTS ACCEPT POSTMARKED AFTER THE 5TH OF THE MO) - UPON FINAL PMT. PL. WILL DISM THIS ACTION - IF DEFS. ARE LATE ON ANY PMT OR DO NOT VACATE AS AGREED, PL. MAY HAVE JUDGMENT FOR REST. OF PREM. & FULL PMT. OF BAL. OWING ON RENT & DAMAGES WITHOUT INSTALL PMTS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE DOCUMENTS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, BONNIE PITTOCK, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: NOT IN ISSUE $3,048.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,048.00, LEASE FORFEITED
